title: Scientific Advisory Committee Medical Devices Used in Cardiovascular System – Agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices Used in the Cardiovascular System (SAC-MDUCS)
Location: 1600 Scott Street, Holland Cross, Tower B, Room 2048 Date & Time: January 24, 2020, 7:30 am - 4:00 pm Participants: SAC-MDUCS members, guest speakers, Health  Canada employees
